{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230446546D19DF536FC22E9C7486"}"},"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7445676213379449624","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"系统的金手指设定，让主角自带开挂属性，开局就打破异世界常规规则，飞速升级、获取珍稀功法、招揽超强小弟，一路打脸反派，契合读者追求轻松、畅快阅读的心理，能快速沉浸其中，缓解现实生活压力。","text_exts":[{"e":27,"s":24,"text":"异世界","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%BC%82%E4%B8%96%E7%95%8C&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742124142E9C7486%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227445676213379449624%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227444540203588389950%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%BC%82%E4%B8%96%E7%95%8C%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1733584457,"group_id":"7444540203588389950","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/I6WcGbsffGXg64DDzMMNhh1agWS0oJKG0ZBDo9XJiK","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1933375298620588","user_name":"不远千里的芮东兴"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1933375298620588","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7444540203588389950","book_info":{"abstract":"李云飞，一个平凡的大学生，在一个雷电交加的夜晚意外穿越到了神秘的古代世界。幸运的是，他携带着最强霸主系统，从此命运发生了翻天覆地的变化。
身无分文、举目无亲的他，凭借系统赋予的任务和奖励，在这个陌生的世界艰难前行。街头卖艺、智斗权贵、勇战强敌，每一次挑战都是成长的机遇。
在这充满未知与危险的异世之旅中，李云飞能否凭借系统的助力，克服重重困难，成就一番惊天动地的霸业？跟随他的脚步，一起领略波澜壮阔的穿越传奇！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6f47118c9f9f107b256585054714d728","author":"紫陌云歌","author_id":"","book_id":"7444540203588389950","book_name":"穿越异世：携系统称霸天下","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":16,"name":"武侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=16&name=武侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7444553888130155070","read_count":"6","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"162650"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"118","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,武侠,系统,穿越,架空","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o6a03537d3c72003d8fca2c669be8fd18~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779396414&x-signature=PyF%2B5yoz5KGp06Wb9Jg7UQV5vaI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"108802506342","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"103"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230446546D19DF536FC22E9C7486"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读20小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_coun
